customDifficulty.$comment: Custom difficulty configuration - only takes effect when difficulty is 'custom'

customWeights.$comment: Custom story type weights - only takes effect when storyType is 'custom'

customTraumaTags.$comment: Extended trauma tags - merged with defaults. Format: KEY: 'Description'

customSkillCategories.$comment: Extended skill categories - merged with defaults. Format: KEY: 'Category_Name'

customGoalTypes.$comment: Extended goal types - merged with defaults. Format: KEY: 'Goal description'

customEmotionTypes.$comment: Extended emotion types - merged with defaults. Format: KEY: 'Emotion name'

customCharacterStatus.$comment: Extended character status - merged with defaults. Format: KEY: 'status_value'
